comment: This company is fantastic.  We had a great first discussion and they captured what we were trying to accomplish and offered suggestions for every part of the project.  We received a detailed project estimate that showed everything we spoke about at a very fair price.  We collected three other proposals but none equaled the detail plans, pictures and comprehensive proposal that Black Hill did.  The project we executed exactly as stated in the proposal and every details was covered along the way in real time.  There is no question that their knowledge of landscaping, the quality of their team and the flawless execution makes them stand out in a very competitive business.  We can't wait to use them again for our next project.
draft_response: We really appreciate the kind words, Sam. Knowing that the landscape design went well for you in Fort Worth is exactly the kind of feedback that keeps our crew motivated. Thank you for trusting Black Hill Landscaping with your property.
